hero.heading: Living Life to the Fullest
hero.subheading: Your connection hub for disability resources, programs, education, and community.

mission.heading: Our Mission
mission.body: While there are so many different programs, resources, and communities whose whole purpose is to support the special needs and disability community, there is no centralized place to find them. Finding the right resource often depends on who you know or how well you can search.

cards.title: Resource Directory
cards.description: Find local and national programs, foundations, services, and support organizations — all in one place.

cards.title: Therapy Guide
cards.description: Learn about different therapy types, when each is most beneficial, and how to find the right provider.

cards.title: Adaptive Equipment
cards.description: Explore adaptive equipment options, curated product lists, and equipment loaner programs.

cards.title: School & IEP Navigation
cards.description: Understand IEPs, 504 plans, your rights, and how to effectively advocate for your child's education.

cards.title: Blog
cards.description: Stories, insights, and practical advice from experts and caregivers in the disability community.

cards.title: Podcast
cards.description: Listen to conversations with families, professionals, and advocates making a difference.

stories.heading: Stories & News
stories.subheading: Positive stories from families and the disability community — updated weekly
stories.emptyMessage: Stories coming soon! We're collecting inspiring stories from families in the disability community.

spotlight.heading: Organization Spotlight
spotlight.subheading: Highlighting organizations providing accessible services and adventures

newsletter.heading: Stay Connected
newsletter.body: Get updates on new resources, blog posts, podcast episodes, and community news delivered to your inbox.

coverage.heading: Serving All 50 States
coverage.body: Disability resources for every state, plus national organizations that serve the entire country.
